Title: PDFME has SSRF via Unvalidated URL Fetch in `getB64BasePdf` When `basePdf` Is Attacker-Controlled
Description: The `getB64BasePdf` function in `@pdfme/common` fetches arbitrary URLs via `fetch()` without any validation when `basePdf` is a non-data-URI string and `window` is defined. An attacker who can control the `basePdf` field of a template (e.g., through a web application that accepts user-supplied templates) can force the server or client to make requests to arbitrary internal or external endpoints, enabling Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in SSR contexts or blind request forgery in browser contexts.
